## CodeRabbit Review Checklist

Before requesting merge, confirm all of the following:

- [ ] CodeRabbit has reviewed the **latest commit SHA** on this branch, not a prior commit.
- [ ] CodeRabbit review state is not `COMMENTED` with unresolved actionable findings.
- [ ] Every actionable CodeRabbit comment is either fixed in a follow-up commit or explicitly deferred with a linked follow-up issue.
- [ ] If CodeRabbit was rate-limited, I waited for cooldown, re-triggered with `@coderabbitai review`, and confirmed the latest commit was reviewed before merging.

> **Rule:** Do not merge while CodeRabbit is pending or rate-limited on the latest commit.
> See: [CodeRabbit merge gate runbook](/docs/process/coderabbit-merge-gate.md)
